title: Der Berg ruft!
writer: Carl Haensel, Richard Billinger, Hanns Saßmann
actors: Luis Trenker, Herbert Dirmoser, Heidemarie Hatheyer
plot: The Italian mountaineer Carel wants to be the first man to stand on the top of the Matterhorn. Since the climb is very difficult, he agrees to try it together with the British mountaineer Whymper. But due to an intrigue this agree...
